zh: 要讓孩童有十足的想像空間、
en: Give children plenty of room to imagine.

zh: 父母親往往因太溺愛子女、
en: parents often spoil their children too much,

zh: 子女要順著做順著想就是好寶寶、
en: Those who simply obey and think as told are called good children,

zh: 因此傳統的家庭父母應有責任給孩子更廣的想像空間、
en: so today's parents should give children wider space to imagine.

zh: 父母親的角色隨著時代改變、
en: The role of parents changes with the times;

zh: 已沒有一成不變的法則、
en: there are no fixed rules anymore.

zh: 對孩童除了要關心、細心、耐心的照料外、
en: Beyond caring for children with attention, care, and patience,

zh: 更是孩童所有知識的啓蒙老師、
en: parents are also the very first teachers of all knowledge.

zh: 而事實孩童的學前教育對孩子的往後成長、
en: A child's preschool education shapes their future growth
in ways that run very deep.

zh: 願天下所有的父母親能夠不斷鞭策自己、
en: May all parents everywhere keep pushing themselves,

zh: 讓我們的下一代能有更完善的空間、
en: so our next generation has a better space to grow.

zh: 使孩子們心存感激更有尊嚴、
en: So our children feel grateful and live with dignity,

zh: 讓我們的社會更祥和更進步。
en: and so our society becomes more peaceful and more advanced.
